title: VimFu — :set list / nolist
description: Use :set list to show invisible whitespace characters like tabs and trailing spaces.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim
Create demo file with tabs and trailing spaces

setup.content:
hello world   
	indented with tab
  indented with spaces
no trailing

steps.say: Set list reveals invisible characters. Tabs, trailing spaces, and end of line markers become visible.
Set list — reveal tabs, trailing spaces, and end-of-line markers.
Now you can see tab characters, trailing spaces, and end of line markers. Great for catching whitespace problems.
Turn it off to go back to normal.
Set no list hides the whitespace markers again.
Set list shows whitespace. Set no list hides it. Toggle with set list bang.
